description_long: This is an adult woman standing upright, dressed in a sleeveless, knee-length dress with a halter neckline and a fitted waist. The dress appears to be made of a smooth, lightweight fabric and is complemented by high-heeled shoes. Her arms are relaxed at her sides, and her posture is straight and composed. The hairstyle is neatly styled into a low bun at the back of her head, with a clean parting. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is formal and elegant, suitable for urban or professional settings. The figure's proportions and details are realistic, with attention to anatomical accuracy and clothing drape.
description: A formally dressed adult woman in a sleeveless halter dress and high heels, standing upright with a neat low bun hairstyle. The appearance is elegant and suitable for urban or professional environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the halter neckline, fitted waist, and both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the dress, the high heels, and the low bun hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the halter dress, the tied waist, and the full view of the low bun.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the dress and shoes, as well as the neat bun from another angle.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless halter-neck knee-length dress with a fitted waist
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair styled in a low bun
